heading: Limitation on use of fees for employee bonuses
label: 6814 Limitation on use of fees for employee bonuses
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, fees collected under the authorities of the chapter may not be used for employee bonuses.
notes: References in TextThe chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “the Act”, and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title VIII of div. J of , , , known as the Federal Lands Recreation Enhancement Act, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. For complete classification of title VIII to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 108–447118 Stat. 3377section 6801 of this titleDec. 8, 2004
